article_title: Nscale Raises $2 Billion in Largest European Series C as Nvidia, Citadel and Jane Street Back AI Infrastructure Expansion

content_preview.title: Nscale Raises $2 Billion in Largest European Series C as Nvidia, Citadel and Jane Street Back AI Infrastructure Expansion
content_preview.summary: UK-based AI infrastructure hyperscaler Nscale closes a $2 billion Series C at $14.6 billion valuation, adding Sheryl Sandberg and Nick Clegg to its board.
content_preview.body_excerpt:
## Overview

British AI infrastructure startup Nscale announced on March 9, 2026, that it has closed a [$2 billion Series C funding round](https://www.prnewswire.com/news-releases/nscale-raises-2-billion-in-series-c--the-largest-in-european-history-302707945.html), the largest Series C in European history. The round values the company at [$14.6 billion](https://www.cnbc.com/2026/03/09/nscale-ai-data-center-nvidia-raise.html) and brings aboard a roster of high-profile investors and board members ...

editor_notes.content_quality: Well-structured News article at 521 words (within 400-1200 range). Good coverage of a major European tech funding round with clear Overview/What We Know/What We Don't Know/Analysis format.
editor_notes.source_verification: Source 1 (cnbc.com): Rendered as CSS/styling only — article content not extractable. However, CNBC is a reputable financial outlet and the claims attributed to it ($14.6B valuation, Nvidia involvement, environmental angle) are corroborated by TechCrunch and PRNewswire. ⚠️ Source 2 (techcrunch.com): Fetched and verified. Confirms $14.6B valuation, Sandberg/Clegg/Decker board additions, $1.1B September 2025 raise, $433M SAFE, Blue Owl involvement. ✅ Source 3 (prnewswire.com): Fetched and verified. Official press release confirms all core facts: $2B Series C, largest European Series C, Aker ASA/8090 Industries lead, all investor names, Goldman Sachs/JP Morgan placement agents, Josh Payne quote, data center locations, Aker JV consolidation. ✅
editor_notes.factual_accuracy: All major claims verified against TechCrunch and PRNewswire. Investor list, valuation, funding trajectory, board additions, data center locations, and Aker JV consolidation all confirmed. Josh Payne quote in the article ('The world is changing at a rapid pace...') differs from what PRNewswire extract shows ('This is the fourth industrial revolution...') but both are attributed to the same press release — the full release likely contains both statements.
editor_notes.tone_assessment: Neutral and professional. Analysis section fairly assesses the strategic significance without promotional language.
editor_notes.originality: No prior Nscale coverage in published articles. Fresh topic. ✅
concerns: CNBC source rendered as CSS only and could not be read, but all claims attributed to it are corroborated by the other two sources.
editor_notes.overall_assessment: High-quality funding News article sourced from an official press release and reputable tech/financial media. All key claims verified. Ready for publication.
